info.name: Microsoft Azure RedisManagementClient
info.description: REST API for Azure Redis Cache Service.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Cache Operations

request.description: Lists all of the available REST API operations of the Microsoft.Cache provider.

response.name: Success. The response describes the list of operations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Cache Checknameavailability

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

request.description: Checks that the redis cache name is valid and is not already in use.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Cache Redis

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

request.description: Gets all Redis caches in the specified subscription.

response.name: response

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Listupgradenotifications

query.description: (Required) how many minutes in past to look for upgrade notifications

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Gets any upgrade notifications for a Redis cache.

response.name: All upgrade notifications in given time range

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) how many minutes in past to look for upgrade notifications

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Listkeys

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Retrieve a Redis cache's access keys. This operation requires write permission to the cache resource.

response.name: Lists the keys for the specified Redis cache.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Regeneratekey

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Regenerate Redis cache's access keys. This operation requires write permission to the cache resource.

response.name: Lists the regenerated keys for Redis Cache

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Forcereboot

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Reboot specified Redis node(s). This operation requires write permission to the cache resource. There can be potential data loss.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Import

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Import data into Redis cache.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Import operation successfully enqueued; follow the Location header to poll for final outcome.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Export

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Export data from the redis cache to blobs in a container.

response.name: Export operation successfully enqueued; follow the Location header to poll for final outcome.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Patchschedules Default

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.
(Required) Default string modeled as parameter for auto generation to work correctly.

request.description: Create or replace the patching schedule for Redis cache (requires Premium SKU).

response.name: The patch schedule was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The patch schedule was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the redis cache.
(Required) Default string modeled as parameter for auto generation to work correctly.

request.description: Deletes the patching schedule of a redis cache (requires Premium SKU).

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Linkedservers Linkedservername

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the Redis cache.
(Required) The name of the linked server that is being added to the Redis cache.

request.description: Adds a linked server to the Redis cache (requires Premium SKU).

response.name: The linked server was successfully added.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The linked server was successfully added.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Linkedservers Linkedservername

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the redis cache.
(Required) The name of the linked server that is being added to the Redis cache.

request.description: Deletes the linked server from a redis cache (requires Premium SKU).

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name Linkedservers Linkedservername

(Required) The name of the redis cache.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Cache Redis Name

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Create or replace (overwrite/recreate, with potential downtime) an existing Redis cache.

response.name: The new redis cache was successfully created. Check provisioningState to see detailed status.

(Required) The name of the Redis cache.

request.description: Update an existing Redis cache.

response.name: The existing redis cache was successfully updated. Check provisioningState to see detailed status.
